_doc: psycohere_v1 — Honesty x TPB between-session merge. honesty_runs.csv has per-question rows (episode_cols=[question_id]). merge_tpb_with_behavior.py joins SR (1 row/condition) with behavioral data (50 rows/condition) producing long CSV — same pattern as sycophancy. Analysis scripts aggregate align_score over questions to condition level. calibrated_confidence -> 1 - brier_c1 (lower brier = better calibrated). keep_confidence_stable -> 1 - inconsistency_abs (lower change = more stable).
